sql_array: CREATE TABLE text_index_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, document TEXT, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO text_index_test (id, document) VALUES (1, 'sample text with some words'), (2, NULL), (3, 'another document {} with special characters!');
SELECT vt_batch(vt_batch_d_id(id), vt_batch_feed(document)) FROM text_index_test WHERE id = 1 OR (id = 2 AND document IS NULL);
SELECT id, vt_batch(vt_batch_d_id(id), vt_batch_feed(document)) FROM text_index_test WHERE (document LIKE '%document%' OR document IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(document) > 0;

WITH doc_batch AS (SELECT id, vt_batch(vt_batch_d_id(id), vt_batch_feed(COALESCE(document, ''))) AS batch FROM text_index_test WHERE document IS NOT NULL OR document = '') SELECT COUNT(*) FROM doc_batch WHERE batch IS NOT NULL OR id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM text_index_test);
CREATE TABLE additional_test (add_id INT, related_id INT, CONSTRAINT fk_id FOREIGN KEY (related_id) REFERENCES text_index_test(id));

SELECT a.add_id, vt_batch(vt_batch_d_id(a.add_id), vt_batch_feed((SELECT document FROM text_index_test WHERE id = a.related_id OR related_id IS NULL))) FROM additional_test a JOIN text_index_test b ON a.related_id = b.id OR (a.add_id IS NULL AND b.document IS NOT NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT vt_batch(vt_batch_d_id(NULLIF(id, 2)), vt_batch_feed(document)) FROM text_index_test WHERE id > 0 OR id = 1 ORDER BY document IS NULL;

SELECT id, vt_batch(vt_batch_d_id(id), vt_batch_feed(document)) AS batch FROM text_index_test WHERE updated_at > (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '10 days') OR (id < 0 AND document IS NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) < 2;
